inputs.title: Guard empty JSON payloads in task API
inputs.description: Return 400 when POST /api/tasks receives an empty body instead of throwing during JSON parse.

rubric.criterion: Includes a failing test or reproduction for the empty-body case.
Change is limited to request parsing and error response wiring.

provenance.source: Redacted from completed code-feature tasks with single-file API guard fixes.
provenance.notes: Pattern-synthesized from representative completed runs; no single source task id archived.
